entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The state of soil functioning as a vital living ecosystem that sustains plants, animals, and humans

entities.name: CARBON FOOTPRINT
entities.description: The total amount of greenhouse gases produced to directly and indirectly support human activities

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: The release of gases that trap heat in the atmosphere, contributing to global warming

entities.name: CSR
entities.description: A specific approach or initiative aimed at building soil health and reducing emissions

entities.name: SOIL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in soil quality caused by its improper use, usually for agricultural purposes

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: The carbon stored in soil organic matter

entities.name: NUTRIENT DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: The lack of essential nutrients required for plant growth in the soil

entities.name: MICRO AND SECONDARY NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential plant nutrients required in smaller quantities than primary nutrients

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: The salt content in the soil, which can inhibit plant growth

entities.name: EROSION
entities.description: The process of wearing away the topsoil by wind or water

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: GLOBAL POPULATION
entities.description: The total number of humans living on Earth

entities.name: CARBON CYCLING
entities.description: The process by which carbon atoms travel from the atmosphere to the Earth and then back into the atmosphere

entities.name: CARBON SEQUESTRATION
entities.description: The process of capturing and storing atmospheric carbon dioxide

entities.name: CARBON DIOXIDE
entities.description: A colorless gas produced by burning carbon and organic compounds and by respiration

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit area

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH MAPPING BASED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A management approach using soil health maps to optimize soil productivity and health
